expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers both required interaction foci under “Evidence-based finding”: “Template × Pause-mode interaction (prompt pause mode)” and “Prompt-editor-open state interaction with close/confirm dialogs”, and ties them to missed enforcement/catch in Phase 5a (“cross-section interaction audit did not catch the target interactions”).

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md frame the evaluation as “phase5a checkpoint enforcement” and include a dedicated “Primary phase alignment” section stating “Primary phase under test: phase5a” plus Phase 5a rubric requirements (Cross-Section Interaction Audit and acceptance gate).
